current.summary: Completed hook adapter Tier 2 migration — all 5 adapters off legacy bridge, shared helpers, degradation enforcement, ADR

activeWork.description: Hook spec alignment — Tier 2 complete, Tier 3 ready
activeWork.progress: All 8 phases executed: pre-work (toolmap/compat gaps), hookhelpers.go (11 shared helpers), 5 adapter migrations (CC, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor, Kiro), legacy bridge removal, Verify() upgrade. Added degradation enforcement (block/exclude/warn) and ADR 0001. Committed as 21aa18f, pushed to main.

git.lastCommit: 21aa18f feat(converter): hook adapter Tier 2 — migrate off legacy bridge
modifiedFiles: cli/internal/converter/toolmap.go (Cline removed, VS Code Copilot added)

recentDecisions: Hybrid architecture: adapters own encode/decode, share stateless translation helpers (not a framework)
Degradation enforcement: block/exclude/warn strategies checked during encode, not deferred (ADR 0001)
status_message added to spec as first-class handler field, JSON tag fixed to snake_case
HookData/HookEntry/render*Hooks preserved — used by HooksConverter pipeline for CLI convert command
ApplyDegradation partially implemented: block+exclude enforced, warn behaves like exclude (wrapper generation deferred)
Kitchen sink test fixtures moved to testdata/ — decoupled from content library
ADR format adopted (Nygard template) at docs/adr/
nextSteps: Start Tier 3: new provider adapters. Factory Droid is the smoke test (CC-identical events). Bead: syllago-h5rsk
VS Code Copilot adapter (syllago-ms77k) — spec fully defines it, toolmap/compat entries already added in Tier 2
Windsurf split-event adapter + OpenCode JS adapter (syllago-pg2cy) — more complex, different paradigms
Consider migrating HooksConverter.Render/Canonicalize to use adapter registry internally (would let us remove render*Hooks from hooks.go)

context.notes: 271 uncommitted files in working tree are pre-existing (content library cleanup, TUI work, etc.) — not from this session. The Tier 2 commit (21aa18f) is clean and pushed. Spec file is at docs/spec/hooks/hooks.md (moved from docs/spec/hooks-v1.md by a prior session). The develop workflow state is at .develop/hook-adapter-tier2-migration.json (stage: complete). RuleSync competitive research is captured in the design doc (25 providers, 7 with hooks). New beads created for missing adapters: VS Code Copilot (P2), Factory Droid (P3), Codex (P4), deepagents-cli (P4).
